name: Chewy Brownie Bon Bons
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Place sheets of foil on countertop for cooling cookies.
2. In a large bowl, combine brown sugar, shortening, water, and vanilla extract. Beat at medium speed of electric mixer until well blended. Add eggs one at a time, beating after each addition until just combined.
3. Sift together flour, cocoa powder, salt, and baking soda. Mix into the batter at low speed just until blended. Stir in chocolate chips.
4. Form dough into 1-inch (2.5 cm) balls. Place them about 2 inches (5 cm) apart on an ungreased baking sheet.
5. Bake one baking sheet at a time at 375°F (190°C) for 7 to 9 minutes, until lightly browned but still soft in the center. Allow cookies to cool for 2 minutes on the baking sheet before removing them to cool completely on the sheets of foil.
6. For icing, chop white chocolate into 1/2-inch (1 cm) pieces. Place pieces in a microwave-safe shallow bowl. Microwave at 100% power for 1 minute. Stir. Repeat microwaving at 30-second intervals until chocolate is melted smoothly. Dip the top of each cooled cookie into the melted chocolate. Immediately place sprinkles in a shallow dish and dip the tops of cookies into sprinkles. Set aside to dry completely. Makes: Approximately 3-1/2 dozen bon bons
